title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Manipal Digital Health - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Manipal Digital Health - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Manipal Digital Health! We are hiring a Backend Developer for our Gwalior team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Manipal Digital Health:
Manipal Digital Health is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manipal Digital Health!
